Name: Swordfish Message Registry
Description: This registry defines the event messages for Swordfish.  This registry has been deprecated in favor of the Storage and StorageCoS registries.

LowSpaceWarningThresholdTriggered.Description: Indicates that a LowSpaceWarningThreshold has been triggered.
LowSpaceWarningThresholdTriggered.LongDescription: Indicates that a LowSpaceWarningThreshold has been triggered. For some resource types, adding more capacity may resolve the low space warning. Other suggested resolutions may be provided as OEM data.
LowSpaceWarningThresholdTriggered.Message: The LowSpaceWarningThreshold %1 has been triggered on %2.
LowSpaceWarningThresholdTriggered.Deprecated: This message was deprecated in favor of the LowSpaceWarningThresholdTriggered messages in Storage.
ArgLongDescriptions: The threshold value that has been exceeded.
The name of the resource for which the threshold value has been exceeded.

LowSpaceWarningThresholdCleared.Description: Indicates that a LowSpaceWarningThreshold has been cleared.
LowSpaceWarningThresholdCleared.LongDescription: A previously triggered low space condition has been resolved.
LowSpaceWarningThresholdCleared.Message: The LowSpaceWarningThreshold %1 has been cleared on %2.
LowSpaceWarningThresholdCleared.Deprecated: This message was deprecated in favor of the LowSpaceWarningThresholdCleared messages in Storage.
ArgLongDescriptions: The threshold value that has been exceeded.
ResourceNameThe name of the resource for which the threshold value has been exceeded.

SearchFailed.Message: Object `%1` not found that matched requested parameters.
SearchFailed.Deprecated: This message was deprecated in favor of the Query messages in Redfish base.
ArgLongDescriptions: The object type that was not found by the submitted query

NoDefaultValue.Description: Indicates that no default value was set.
NoDefaultValue.LongDescription: Indicates that no default value was set.
NoDefaultValue.Deprecated: This message was deprecated in favor of `PropertyMissing`.
NoDefaultValue.Message: No default value has been set for property `%1`.
ArgLongDescriptions: The name of the property that does not have a default property defined
NoDefaultValue.Resolution: Assign a default value for the property.

ClassOfServiceOutOfCompliance.Description: Indicates that the class of service is out of compliance.
ClassOfServiceOutOfCompliance.LongDescription: The requirements for the named class of service have not been met.
ClassOfServiceOutOfCompliance.Message: The service level requirements of the %1 class of service are out of compliance.
ClassOfServiceOutOfCompliance.Deprecated: This message was deprecated in favor of `ClassOfServiceOutOfCompliance` in the StorageCoS registry.
ArgLongDescriptions: Name of the class of service that is out of compliance.
ClassOfServiceOutOfCompliance.Resolution: Resolution dependent upon class of service and resource type.

LineOfServiceOutOfCompliance.Description: Indicates that the line of service is out of compliance.
LineOfServiceOutOfCompliance.LongDescription: The requirements for the named line of service have not been met.
LineOfServiceOutOfCompliance.Message: The service level requirements of the %1 line of service are out of compliance.
LineOfServiceOutOfCompliance.Deprecated: This message was deprecated in favor of `LineOfServiceOutOfCompliance` in the StorageCoS registry.
ArgLongDescriptions: Name of the line of service that is out of compliance.
LineOfServiceOutOfCompliance.Resolution: Resolution dependent upon line of service and resource type.

OutOfCompliance.Description: Indicates that the service level requirements are out of compliance.
OutOfCompliance.LongDescription: Indicates that the service level requirements are out of compliance.
OutOfCompliance.Message: The service level requirements of %1 are out of compliance.
OutOfCompliance.Deprecated: This message was deprecated in favor of `OutOfCompliance` in the StorageCoS registry.
ArgLongDescriptions: Name of the resource that is out of compliance.
OutOfCompliance.Resolution: Resolution dependent upon service level and resource type.
